title: 菊花賞の後に・聡明剛毅

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Kikuka Sho proves to be an insurmountable
wall, but Rudolf still has her pride. She will
demonstrate her unbreakable determination at
the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Afterwards, Narita Brian, who was watching the
race, comes by the waiting room.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Their terse conversation ends with some pointed
remarks from Brian about Rudolf's insistence on
keeping up her student council duties.
